content:
Hi guys!

I just received a lot of fascinating suggestions about standardizing & elevating the style of gameplay texts and UI texts. We were super excited about these! But after discussing with team I found myself replying 'no'... and I thought I owe you guys a further explanation.

Basically: we're playing it safe with **currently functional (but maybe not "good enough" in terms of style)** gameplay and UI texts,** not because your idea isn't good enough**;
It's simply because **our current capacity as devs** just isn't there to match your idea yet. <:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541>

So it's really not a rejection of your suggestions! In a way I feel guilty we can't make all of this happen yet. I really wish we could do more. Your suggestions and ideas are all being recorded and translated into Chinese for the team to consider!
I think it'd definitely be something really nice to consider in the future but I assume it's just a case of wanting the foundations to work first and be watertight before we put anything fancy in
Don't wanna run before we can walk <:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541>

Yes exactly,

Speaking from experience, when the entire game is still kind of wacky in terms of overall translation quality, local stylistic improvements to UI texts often aren't appreciated by the players *("why is team called team here but entourge there?"）*
I don't want other players to go 'this update made translation worse' and hurt our volunteers' spirit. I know how it feels.
makes sense to me! thank you Ace

Okay! I'm very glad to have some official feedback on this.
I understand that I'm getting quite a bit overzealous about this, but that's only because I love this game so much and want to see it be perfect! I definitely don't want to put any pressure on you guys, so reining me in is appreciated lol.
That being said, although the wind in my sails is slowing and the harbor says they're closed, this ship is still sailing. I'll focus for now on fixing what's blatantly and obviously incorrect on a functional level so I can put my money where my mouth is in terms of getting work done;
but I will continue persistently on writing a detailed list of all of the changes I would make and the reasons why, and work on implementing them with a ready-to-go comprehensive overhaul in case you would like to use it. I really don't mind doing the work, it's fun, and I think it's worthwhile even if it doesn't all end up getting used.

I hope to have my effort help inform the devs in some way on how *they'd* like to make the game better, and my sky-high hopeful ideal is to have a meaningful impact on the official english version when and if it releases someday! I'm treating this like a collaborative effort with the devs and for that I'm endlessly grateful.
Much love!
I'd love to see your thought processes/notes on this! Reading back in the chat and you've got so many ideas already
I'm an open book! If not chatting here you're welcome to DM me~
<a:Amiyanoted:1329074570229059607> definitely! It's uber late for me right now but I absolutely want to get started on stuff tomorrow
what time zone are you in? I'm on the Pacific Coast so it's 8:25pm for me right now.
I'm BST right now so it's like half 4 <:tulu_sleep:1408324300993462333>
-# I shouldn't be awake oops
wow, no kidding then. 8 hours ahead is a doozy
sleep well new friend
Do you think in the context of Salvador's story 'unto' would sound more appropriate for a religious verse than 'upon'?
absolutely

i'd also maybe try to rewrite it to have more of a religious air, since holy scripture stuff has a very distinct style

maybe something like...

Thus, I proclaim: Lay all your suffering upon me. Let those tormented by life, and those stricken by disease, be made whole. Let pain and madness melt away, as frost before the rising sun. Let you, my brethren, receive joy everlasting.
would just be my take on it though, i'm not exactly a good writer so
also i just realized in writing that that I went back to upon but yeah unto is a much more fitting word for the religious style of the text
yesss I was thinking something like that
I'm glad I'm not the only one making Salvador's text more classic English
oooh which part are you working on (just so we don't clash)
text messages
check pins
tyty
